name: Telekinesis Attack
description: Use your telekinesis magic power! Gain the ability to control the power of thought! Throw your enemies wherever you want, hit them against whatever you want and deal with them however you want! Using your unique power, defeat all enemies, interact with different objects, take away weapons from enemies and be the strongest!
instructions: Control by pulling enemies just hold down the mouse button on the enemy and pull him in different directions to defeat the enemy just throw him in any direction
tags: 3D Games, Fighting, First Person Shooter, Magic, Shoot, Shooter, Stickman, Superhero, Unity3D
